glue.crawler.catalogtarget.CfnAbout: Specifies an AWS Glue Data Catalog target.

glue.crawler.catalogtarget.ConnectionNam.Description: The name of the connection for an Amazon S3-backed Data Catalog table to be a target of the crawl when using a `Catalog` connection type paired with a `NETWORK` Connection type.

glue.crawler.catalogtarget.DatabaseName.Description: The name of the database to be synchronized.

glue.crawler.catalogtarget.DlqEventQueue.Description: A valid Amazon dead-letter SQS ARN. For example, `arn:aws:sqs:region:account:deadLetterQueue`.

glue.crawler.catalogtarget.EventQueueArn.Description: A valid Amazon SQS ARN. For example, `arn:aws:sqs:region:account:sqs`.

glue.crawler.catalogtarget.Tables.Description: A list of the tables to be synchronized.
